title: DLSA Narsinghpur – Vehicle Driver – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DLSA Narsinghpur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Narsinghpur (DLSA Narsinghpur) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Vehicle Driver. Candidates with 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 04-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DLSA Narsinghpur official website.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass from Recognized Board, Valid Driving License, Experience in Driving All Types of Vehicles, Preference to Automobile Mechanic

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: narsinghpur.dcourts.gov.in
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
